appraisal_events.evidence: « Swann, en son coeur, s'adressa à elle ... comme à une amie d'Odette qui devrait bien lui dire de ne pas faire attention à ce comte de Forcheville. »
appraisal_events.explanation: Swann is shown in a jealous, dependent posture, imploring the 'petite phrase' to intercede with Odette against Forcheville, which locally lowers his emotional standing.

status_effects.explanation: His inner plea to the music to sway Odette away from Forcheville reveals insecurity and jealousy, weakening his local emotional position.
